title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
